reason: Bitcoin is experiencing significant downward pressure, highlighted by whale selling and recent buyers capitulating below $65,000. Broader market weakness is evident with major altcoins (DOGE, ETH, XRP) also sliding due to realized loss spikes. Macroeconomic uncertainty (tariff concerns) is weighing on all risk assets, including crypto. While quantum computing poses a long-term systemic risk, immediate concerns are driven by supply-side pressure and a challenging macro environment, indicating potential for further downside.
headlines: Bitcoin slides 5%,  tumbling below $65,000 as whale selling grows and recent buyers lock in losses
How decentralized AI is leveling the playing field
To freeze or not to freeze: Satoshi and the $440 billion in bitcoin threatened by quantum computing
Bitcoin see-saws around $68,000, DOGE, ETH slide as tariff uncertainty weighs on risk assets
XRP falls 4% as network sees biggest realized loss spike since 2022
